zh.lifeSummary: 當Roland MacUchtred of Galloway於大約1164年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway44歲，母親Gunhilda of Allerdale41歲。他於大約1185年與Elena de Morville在英國波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1200年12月12日在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roland MacUchtred of Galloway于大约1164年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway44岁，母亲Gunhilda of Allerdale41岁。他于大约1185年与Elena de Morville在英国波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1200年12月12日在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Roland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + land ‘land, territory’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In Old French literature it is borne by a legendary Frankish hero, a vassal of Charlemagne, whose exploits are told in the Chanson de Roland. The subject of the poem is Roland's death at the Battle of Roncesvalles in the Pyrenees in 778 , while protecting the rearguard of the Frankish army on its retreat from Spain. Roland is depicted in literature and legend as headstrong and impulsive. His devoted friendship with the prudent Oliver is also legendary.

variants.name: Rowland
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roland  , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roland MacUchtred of Galloway was born about 1164, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, was 44 and his mother, Gunhilda of Allerdale, was 41. He married Elena de Morville about 1185, in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 December 1200, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roland MacUchtred of Galloway est né environ 1164, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Gunhilda of Allerdale, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Elena de Morville environ 1185, à Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1200, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roland MacUchtred of Galloway um 1164 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway 44 und seine Mutter Gunhilda of Allerdale 41. Er hat um 1185 in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England Elena de Morville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1200 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roland MacUchtred of Galloway è nato il circa 1164 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Gunhilda of Allerdale, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Elena de Morville circa 1185, nel Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 dicembre 1200, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roland MacUchtred of Gallowayが約1164年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Gallowayは44歳，母Gunhilda of Allerdaleは41歳であった。約1185年にイギリスクウンバーランドキルコスワルドでElena de Morvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1200年12月12日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roland MacUchtred of Galloway(이)가 대략 1164년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Gunhilda of Allerdale(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1185년 영국 c벌랜드 커코즈월드에서 Elena de Morville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1200년 12월 12일 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Abbey of Saint Andrew, Northamptonshire,: North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roland MacUchtred of Galloway nasceu aproximadamente 1164, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Gunhilda of Allerdale, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Elena de Morville aproximadamente 1185, em Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1200, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roland MacUchtred of Galloway родился около 1164 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Gunhilda of Allerdale, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Elena de Morville около 1185 г. в местности киркосвалд, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 декабря 1200 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roland MacUchtred of Galloway nació aproximadamente 1164, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Uchtred MacFergus Lord of Galloway, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Gunhilda of Allerdale, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Elena de Morville aproximadamente 1185, en Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1200, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
